subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Covenant! Thy services at the Sacred Threshold are acceptable, and at the Divine Court thou art, in truth, steadfast and firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون عهد و پیمان خدماتت در عتبه علیا مقبول و در درگاه کبریا فی الحقیقه ثابت و راسخی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
